hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eqi 'vercel([[:space:]]|$)' && printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eqi -- '(--prod|--production|[[:space:]]promote([[:space:]]|$))'; then echo 'Blocked: direct Vercel production deploy. This project auto-deploys to production on git push, so deploy by committing and running git push origin main. Do not run vercel --prod or vercel promote; that previously shipped uncommitted code and made production drift from git.' >&2; exit 2; fi
